summary: Tested onboarding flow, auto-generated bio, avatar upload, task reminder/scheduled_time, and seed on both backend and frontend. All 10 backend pytest cases PASS. Full 13-step onboarding UI walks through cleanly on mobile viewport (390x844); redirect from / to /onboarding on fresh state confirmed; Profile bio card renders generated bio matching backend; profile-edit-btn correctly navigates back to /onboarding; Add Quest modal reminder toggle + time defaults per slot (morning 08:00 / afternoon 13:00 / evening 20:00) confirmed; all 8 seeded tasks display task-time-{id} tags with bell icon.

issues: Console spam: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated - use boxShadow (multiple StyleSheet.create entries use shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset). Not blocking but should be migrated.
props.pointerEvents deprecation warning - use style.pointerEvents. Likely inside Animated.View in tasks.tsx (xpFloater).

react_native_issues.issue: Installed expo-image-picker@55.0.19 but Expo expects ~17.0.10 for current SDK. May misbehave on native. Non-blocking on web since onb-avatar-pick was skipped in tests.

action_items: Optional: Update Profile TypeScript type in /app/frontend/src/api.ts to include onboarding_complete, bio, avatar_base64, onboarding fields - currently referenced in index.tsx and profile.tsx at runtime but missing from the TS interface (TypeScript lint / intellisense gap, no runtime bug).
Optional: Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow to silence deprecation warnings on web.
Optional: Align expo-image-picker version with expected ~17.0.10 per Expo doctor warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile TS type in src/api.ts missing onboarding_complete/bio/avatar_base64/onboarding fields even though backend serialize_profile returns them and UI consumes them (functionally works but breaks type safety).
server.py is ~700 lines - approaching the recommended split threshold. Consider splitting routes (profile, tasks, goals, stats) into modules.
_build_bio: When gender=='Other' the gender token is correctly dropped; when age+gender absent, intro still reads 'A on a self-improvement quest' - handled via else branch, verified.
seed_data_creation: After tests finished, reset profile and re-seeded 8 default tasks so DB is in a clean onboarding_complete=false state with seeded tasks for next session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding, bio-generation, avatar, task reminder/time, and seed flows fully verified on web preview. Mobile viewport 390x844 works. Notifications no-op on web as expected. Next iterations can skip these unless code changes in the affected files.
